hbp_frame._comment: 12-byte fixed HBP header layout. These are not mapped to integers — they are protocol-level byte constants used by the binary codec in every language.

message_types._comment: Byte 3 of the HBP header. Groups A–D. Generated as HbpMessageType enum/constants in each language.

error_categories._comment: Byte 0 of the 0x03 Error payload. Generated as HbpErrorCategory enum.
